events.name: Law School Admissions Panel
events.description: A panel featuring current law students and recent graduates sharing their experience with the law school application process, LSAT preparation, personal statements, and choosing the right school. Open to all POLIS fellows and prospective members.
events.location: Pugh Hall, Room 170 — University of Florida

events.name: Resume and LinkedIn Workshop
events.description: An interactive workshop on building a strong resume and LinkedIn profile for careers in public service, law, government, and policy. Fellows will receive personalized feedback and leave with a polished one-page resume.
events.location: Reitz Union, Room 2335 — University of Florida

events.name: Public Service Networking Night
events.description: An evening of structured networking with professionals working in public service, government, law, and policy. Bring business cards, practice your elevator pitch, and connect with leaders in the fields you are pursuing.
events.location: Smathers Library, East Reading Room — University of Florida
